title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you have any pets? What do you think of animals as companions?
Are you interested in wildlife? What animals do you find most fascinating?
Do you think it's fair to keep animals in zoos?
What do you think is the best thing about having a pet?
Are there any animals you're particularly afraid of? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Should animals ever be used for scientific research?
Do you think people have a moral responsibility to protect endangered species?
Is it more important to save domestic animals or wild ones?
